description_long: This storage locker is a large, rectangular structure with a ribbed, dark blue sloped roof and solid black walls. The front side features a segmented door area with a horizontal slit, likely for ventilation or mail, and a subtle handle or latch. The sides are mostly solid, with a horizontal gray band running along the lower portion, suggesting reinforced construction. The rear and side views show the continuous ribbed roof and the absence of windows or additional openings, emphasizing security and durability. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for protecting valuable items or equipment in an urban environment. The materials and construction suggest it is weather-resistant and intended for outdoor or semi-outdoor use.
description: A large, rectangular storage locker with a ribbed blue sloped roof, solid black walls, and a reinforced gray base, featuring a front door with a horizontal slit and subtle handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door with a horizontal slit and a subtle handle, along with the ribbed blue roof and reinforced gray base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped ribbed roof and solid black wall, with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous ribbed blue roof and solid black wall with a gray base, no visible openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the door area with segmented panels and a horizontal slit, as well as the ribbed roof.
